name: HIGH: Traffic Congestion Hotspot
description: Detects 2 or more high/critical traffic congestion events in ANY single zone within a 2-minute window. Groups by zone so multiple zones can alert simultaneously.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as incident_count, AVG(average_speed_kmh) as avg_speed FROM TrafficEvent(type='congestion', severity in ('high','critical')).win:time(2 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

name: CRITICAL: Cascading Urban Crisis
description: Correlates a severe storm, a critical traffic accident, and a high/critical health emergency in the same zone within a 5-minute sliding window.
epl_rule: SELECT c.zone as zone, c.wind_speed_kmh as wind_speed_kmh, t.injuries as injuries, h.call_type as call_type FROM ClimateEvent(type='storm', severity in ('high','critical')).win:time(5 min) as c, TrafficEvent(type='accident', severity in ('severe','critical')).win:time(5 min) as t, HealthEvent(type='emergency_call', severity in ('high','critical')).win:time(5 min) as h WHERE c.zone = t.zone AND t.zone = h.zone

name: MEDIUM: Sustained Moderate Air Quality Degradation
description: Detects 3 or more medium-severity air-quality readings in any zone within a 3-minute window.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as readings, AVG(aqi) as avg_aqi FROM EnvironmentEvent(type='air_quality', severity='medium').win:time(3 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

name: LOW: Elevated Public Gathering Activity
description: Detects 3 or more public gathering events in the same zone within a 5-minute window.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as gatherings FROM PopulationEvent(type='gathering').win:time(5 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
